---
title: "Python Programming"
description: "Course Support Lead -- Postgraduate course, Imperial College London"
date: 2020-09-01
role: "Course Support Lead"
type: "Postgraduate course"
venue: "Imperial College London, Department of Computing"
location: "London, UK"
aliases:
  - /teaching/2020-imperial-python
---

In this role I assist the lecturer in coordinating the TAs, create tutorials for the students, mark coursework and help students in tutorials.

### Materials developed for course:
1. Introduction to pytorch for deep learning jupyter notebook for deep learning tutorial: [download](/files/teaching/Python_DeepLearning_Tut.ipynb) [COLAB](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1GIFBUWqEFaE3pvHjofsSgtTqL4ynnXcX?usp=sharing)
2. Fun challenge to create your own COVID track and trace programme for Object Orientation Programming tutorial: [download](/files/teaching/COVID_tracker.html)
3. Intro to Linux Shell Commands tutorial [here](https://python.pages.doc.ic.ac.uk/2021/lessons/shell/)
